title: Cartouche
writer: Daniel Boulanger, Philippe de Broca, Charles Spaak
actors: Jean-Paul Belmondo, Claudia Cardinale, Jess Hahn
plot: The story of a kid from the back streets who wants to become king of Paris. Brought up among petty thieves, he becomes their leader through an audacious and elegant coup which wins him the love of the beautiful Venus.
